executive_summary: Tecnomania is a mid-size Spanish electronics retailer requesting last-mile coverage for its peninsula and Balearic B2C parcel volume. Declared daily volume is 8,000 parcels, of which roughly 6,100 are serviceable under Amazon Shipping's home-delivery, B2C, <=15kg footprint once Portugal cross-border and out-of-network demand are excluded. Pricing across all three guardrail-compliant scenarios clears the 13% minimum contribution margin floor. The historical win-probability model rates this a Strong opportunity, driven primarily by high geo-fit and a clean B2C profile. Key open item: confirm final Balearic Islands volume share before locking the pricing scenario.

opportunity_score.label: Strong
opportunity_score.rationale: High geo-fit (76%), fully serviceable weight/size profile, and no international or B2B demand outside the Portugal exclusion.

exclusions.reason: PUDO-only demand not compatible with home-delivery model

risk_assessment.risk: Balearic Islands volume share not finalized, affecting cost-to-serve estimate
Incumbent carrier pricing undercuts aggressive scenario by ~4%
Conservative scenario margin sits close to the 13% floor if Balearic share exceeds 20%

pricing_scenarios.name: Aggressive
pricing_scenarios.rationale: Wins volume against incumbent at the lowest guardrail-compliant margin.
pricing_scenarios.tradeoffs: Thin buffer above the 13% floor; any FX or weight-mix shift risks a no-go re-price.

pricing_scenarios.name: Balanced
pricing_scenarios.rationale: Targets the midpoint between guardrail floor and target margin.
pricing_scenarios.tradeoffs: Moderately competitive; acceptable buffer for weight-band variance.

pricing_scenarios.name: Conservative
pricing_scenarios.rationale: Meets the 21% target margin used as the internal benchmark.
pricing_scenarios.tradeoffs: Least competitive versus incumbent; higher win-probability risk.

commercial_strategy: Lead with the Balanced scenario to stay price-competitive against the incumbent while preserving margin buffer, and use the Aggressive scenario only if Tecnomania signals a hard price ceiling. Sequence a pilot on peninsula volume first, adding Balearic Islands once the x1.35 regional multiplier is validated against a live weight-band sample.
follow_up_actions: Confirm exact Balearic Islands daily volume share with Tecnomania before finalizing scenario
Request 4-week weight/size distribution sample to validate oversized exclusion estimate
Clarify current incumbent contract length and any exit penalties
pitch_deck_url_or_markdown:
# Tecnomania S.L.U. -- Amazon Shipping Proposal

## Why Amazon Shipping
Serviceable daily volume of ~6,100 parcels across peninsula and Balearic Islands B2C demand...

## Pricing
Balanced scenario recommended at EUR4.20/parcel avg, 17.5% contribution margin.

## Next Steps
Confirm Balearic volume share, then move to pilot.

sources_used.detail: slide 6, weight/size limits and coverage area

assumptions_and_open_questions: Assumed Balearic Islands share is 15% of serviceable volume pending client confirmation
Assumed weight/size distribution matches Tecnomania's stated category mix (electronics, low oversized rate)
